name: /compliance-add: rejects a why_authoritative shorter than 3 lines (§2.19 hard requirement)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf 'Too short.\n' > why.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://www.nist.gov --id nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --why-authoritative-file "$PWD/why.txt"
